package.name: antoniq_description
package.description: TurtleBot3 Waffle URDF description, with Gazebo (gz-sim) sensor and diff-drive plugins built in so it can be spawned directly from robot_description, without depending on turtlebot3_gazebo's model.sdf. Meshes vendored from turtlebot3_description (Apache-2.0, ROBOTIS CO., LTD).
